sentences.arabic: تَعَبَتِ الْبِنْتُ مِنَ الْمَشْيِ وَجَلَسَتْ عَلَى الْمَقْعَدِ.
sentences.translation: Djevojčica se umorila od hodanja i sjela na klupu.
sentences.translationEn: The girl got tired from walking and sat on the bench.

sentences.translation: Otac joj je dao flašu vode i nasmiješio se.
sentences.translationEn: Her father gave her a water bottle and smiled.

sentences.translation: Popila je vodu i malo se odmorila.
sentences.translationEn: She drank the water and rested a little.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ قَامَتْ وَقَالَتْ: أَنَا مُسْتَعِدَّةٌ الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Onda je ustala i rekla: Sada sam spremna.
sentences.translationEn: Then she got up and said: I am ready now.
